name: nethook
description: Marketplace for Nethook — a NetHack-style ASCII fishing roguelike you play in a second terminal window while Claude Code works.

plugins.name: nethook
plugins.description: A NetHack-style ASCII fishing roguelike to play in a second terminal window while Claude Code is busy. /gofish opens it; a hook pings you when Claude is done. Generate playable real-world fishing spots with /nethook:spot.
